description: Style Note puma combines style with utility in their range of handbags. With a dash of colour, innovative shapes and designs which follow fashion trends, this accessory will complete your outfit. Don't miss out on this must-have bag for the season! Product Details A spacious charcoal grey handbag with an embroidered Puma cat and inverted pleats in front Two black twill tape straps One main zippered compartment with internal open organiser pockets and an internal zippered pocket Another zippered compartment extending into the main compartment A twill tape stitched on the front concealed pocket Material and Care 100% nylon Wipe clean with a damp cloth when required Do not use detergent Size Height: 30 cm Width: 49 cm Depth: 17 cm
